description: Sentence-level delta classifier. Aligns each response sentence to its best-matching neutral sentence using Hungarian matching (optimal bipartite, not greedy). For each aligned pair, classifies [sent_emb | neutral_sent_emb | sent_emb - neutral_sent_emb] -> promotional or not. Aggregates sentence-level predictions across the document. Keeps sentence granularity but makes the comparison directional rather than a scalar distance. Trainer type: sentence_delta_classifier.
